document_meta.title: 3M Acrylic Foam Tape GT7100 Series Technical Data Sheet
document_meta.source_text: Decem ber 2025 Supersedes version dated April 2025 3M Acrylic Foam Tape GT7100 Series Technical Data Sheet

sections.source_text: Technical Data Sheet General Description 3M Acrylic Foam Tape GT7100 Series offers very good adhesion performance and high flexibility. These tapes are specifically designed for the attachment of automotive exterior and interior trim applications.
sections.title: General Description
sections.content: 3M Acrylic Foam Tape GT7100 Series offers very good adhesion performance and high flexibility. These tapes are specifically designed for the attachment of automotive exterior and interior trim applications.

sections.source_text: 3M Tape GT7100 Series offers the following key features: . Provides final adhesion and holding power to automotive paints and substrates . M eets a number of OEM specifications . Follows the shrinkage and elongation of the plastic part caused by temperature changeand h as good stress relaxation properties . Stress relaxation characteristics of the viscoelastic core, allow the tape to conform wellto complex geometries and deliver excellent wet out . Demonstrates excellent adhesive performance at various temperature conditions . Excels in a variety of weather conditions and offers solvent and high temperatureresistance.
sections.title: Key Features
content: Provides final adhesion and holding power to automotive paints and substrates
Meets a number of OEM specifications
Follows the shrinkage and elongation of the plastic part caused by temperature change and has good stress relaxation properties
Stress relaxation characteristics of the viscoelastic core allow the tape to conform well to complex geometries and deliver excellent wet out
Demonstrates excellent adhesive performance at various temperature conditions
Excels in a variety of weather conditions and offers solvent and high temperature resistance

sections.source_text: Product Construction Polyethylene Red liner Acrylic Pressure Sensitive Adhesive Acrylic Foam Acrylic Pressure Sensit ive Adhesive
sections.title: Product Construction
sections.content: Polyethylene red liner / Acrylic pressure sensitive adhesive / Acrylic foam / Acrylic pressure sensitive adhesive

sections.source_text: Physical Properties Product Core Core Color Thickness * Liner Adhesive GT7102 Acrylic Foam Core Gray 0.2 mmTranslucent, red, polyethylene liner Acrylic pressuresensitive GT7104 0.4 mm GT7106 0.6 mm GT7108 0.8 mm GT7110 1.0 mm GT7112 1.2 mm GT7116 1.6 mm GT7120 2.0 mm GT7125 2.5 mm GT7130 Acrylic Foam Core White 3.0 mm GT7135 3.5 mm GT7140 4.0 mm *Liner thickness is not included
sections.title: Physical Properties
sections.content: Item matrix lists GT7102 through GT7140 with core type, core color, thickness, liner, and adhesive.

sections.source_text: Tabbing An extended liner tab is recommended. Tabbing Method and Liner Types Tabbing Tape Regional Availability Heat -Bond Tabbing for Non- Silicone Coated Liners 3M Tabbing Tape 5081 or 5082 EMEA, Americas 3M Tabbing Tape AM012 Asia PSA Tabbing for Non- Silicone Coated Liners 3M Tabbing Tape 5300 Global 3M Tabbing Tape AM926J , AM926JN or 4240, 4240N Asia
sections.title: Tabbing
sections.content: An extended liner tab is recommended. Tabbing method table recommends specific 3M tabbing tapes for non-silicone coated liners by region.

sections.source_text: Typical p erformance of 3M Acrylic Foam Tape Series GT7100 is shown below. Peel and shear values depend onsubs trate characteristics and/or paint composition. These values are for reference only, and not to be used for specification purposes. For specification values please see the certificate of analysis.
sections.title: Performance Properties
sections.content: Typical peel and shear values depend on substrate characteristics and/or paint composition. Values are for reference only and not to be used for specification purposes. Specification values should come from the certificate of analysis.

sections.source_text: Conditions/Test Parameter Definitions: •Immediate State = 23°C, 20 minutes •Normal State = 23°C, 24 hours •High Temperature = 23°C, 24 hours -> 80°C •Heat-aging = 23°C, 24 hours -> 80°C, 336 hours -> 23°C, 24 hours •Warm Water Immersion = 23°C, 24 hours -> 40°C water, 336 hours -> 23°C, 24 hours •Gasoline Immersion = 23°C, 24 hours -> Gasoline, 1 hour -> 23°C, 24 hours •Wax-remover immersion = 23°C, 24 hours -> Wax-remover , 1 hour -> 23°C, 24 hours
sections.title: Conditions/Test Parameter Definitions
content: Warm Water Immersion = 23°C, 24 hours -> 40°C water, 336 hours -> 23°C, 24 hours
Gasoline Immersion = 23°C, 24 hours -> Gasoline, 1 hour -> 23°C, 24 hours
Wax-remover immersion = 23°C, 24 hours -> Wax-remover, 1 hour -> 23°C, 24 hours

sections.source_text: 180° Peel Adhesion to Painted Panel Tape Size: 25 mm width; Tape backing: 25 um PET film; Rolling Pressure: 5 kg roller one-way; Peel Speed: 50 mm/min. Substrate Conditions/Test Parameters Typical Performance Value (N/cm) GT7102 GT7104 GT7106 GT7108 GT7110 GT7112 GT7116 GT7120 GT7125 GT7130 GT7135 GT7140
sections.title: 180° Peel Adhesion to Painted Panel
sections.content: Typical performance matrix in N/cm across GT7102-GT7140 for painted panel and PVC panel under multiple conditions.

sections.source_text: Shear Strength Tape Size: 25 mm x 25 mm; Rolling Pressure: 5 kg roller one-way; Tensile Speed: 50 mm/min. Test measures liner side adhesion to painted panel and non -liner side adhesion to PVC panel.
sections.title: Shear Strength
sections.content: Typical performance matrix in MPa across GT7102-GT7140 for painted panel and PVC panel bonded configuration under multiple conditions.

sections.source_text: Shelf Life Three years from date of manufacture when stored at recommended storage condition 23°C +/ -2°C and 50% +/ -4% relative humidity. 3M Acrylic Foam Tape GT7100 Series should be stored in typical storage conditions for pressure-sensitive adhesives used within the automotive industry. During transportation, storage conditions are uncontrolled for a short period of time (a few days or weeks). This should not impact product performance. However, materials should not be stored in excess of the recommended conditions for extended periods.
sections.title: Shelf Life
sections.content: Three years from date of manufacture when stored at recommended storage condition 23°C +/-2°C and 50% +/-4% relative humidity. Short uncontrolled transportation periods should not impact product performance, but extended storage beyond recommended conditions is discouraged.

unresolved.reason: The document contains a clear shear strength matrix in MPa, but no exact approved parameter key is provided in the dictionary snapshot for this metric.
The closest available dictionary key is foil_peel_strength, but the source is a 180° peel adhesion matrix to painted panel and PVC panel in N/cm. Final key fit should be reviewed before import.
